name: Li'l Miss Vampire Can't Suck Right
original_name: ちゃんと吸えない吸血鬼ちゃん
overview: With her cool, mysterious aura, transfer student Ishikawa Luna is already the most popular girl in class. Ohtori, on the other hand, is so average he's practically a background character. The thought of ever speaking with Luna never even crossed his mind—until he accidentally discovers her secret: She’s a vampire…who's absolutely terrible at sucking blood!
